title: DroneAudioset
blurb: Large-scale dataset and benchmarks for drone-based audio perception in search-and-rescue settings.

title: Feeling the Facts
blurb: Investigating whether just-in-time AI nudges can support misinformation resilience in live auditory streams.

title: Explainable Dysarthric Speech Clarity
blurb: Temporally explainable speech clarity scoring to support clinical assessment workflows for motor speech disorders.

title: Scene-to-Audio (SonicVista)
blurb: Distant scene sonification for blind and low-vision users via generative audio compositions.

title: Controllable Audio Generation
blurb: Methods for controllable synthesis and perceptual morphing of environmental sounds and audio textures.

title: MuSigPro
blurb: Commercialising AI for singing quality assessment and lyrics alignment; adopted by real users and industry partners.
